official_route_sources.evidence: DataMine lists historical Futures & Options datasets including Market by Order and provides data-sales ordering contact.
official_route_sources.request_use: Primary path for CME, NYMEX, COMEX, and CME Globex historical order-lifecycle/depth export request.

official_route_sources.evidence: Market Depth FAQ describes FIX/FAST market-depth files, order-book reconstruction, millisecond timestamps, and product-dependent start dates.
official_route_sources.request_use: Use to ask CME Data Sales to confirm 2011-2013 product coverage for CL, NG, HG, and ES cells.

official_route_sources.evidence: Cboe's public CFE page exposes daily volume/open-interest history and points to Cboe DataShop for custom VIX futures historical data.
official_route_sources.request_use: Public history is not enough; use this to route the 2014 VIX/CFE depth/order-lifecycle request to DataShop/support.

official_route_sources.route: Cboe Market Data Services U.S. Futures
official_route_sources.evidence: Cboe U.S. Futures market-data services describe VIX futures data with Top-of-Book and Depth-of-Book feeds and support contacts.
official_route_sources.request_use: Use to request CFE/VIX futures depth/order-lifecycle availability and licensing for historical 2014 controls.
